title: PreprintDetail
description: Metadata for a single medRxiv or bioRxiv preprint

doi.description: Digital Object Identifier for the preprint

title.example: Impact of intervention on disease transmission in urban settings

authors.description: Semicolon-separated list of author names in 'Surname, Firstname' format
authors.example: Smith, John; Jones, Alice; Brown, Kevin

author_corresponding_institution.description: Institution affiliation of the corresponding author
author_corresponding_institution.example: Department of Epidemiology, University of Medicine

date.description: Date the preprint was posted in YYYY-MM-DD format

version.description: Version number of this preprint (first submission is '1')

license.description: Creative Commons or other license under which the preprint is published

jatsxml.description: URL to the JATS XML source file for the preprint

abstract.description: Full abstract text of the preprint
abstract.example: Background: This study investigates the impact of...

published.description: Published DOI if the preprint has been published in a peer-reviewed journal, or 'NA' if not yet published

server.description: Server where the preprint is hosted
